description: Quality delta between Claude without the skill vs with the skill loaded

typical_issues: Uses PreToolUse instead of PostToolUse for post-edit formatting
Missing matcher field — hook applies to all tool calls
Command does not reference the edited file path
Wraps synchronous formatter in unnecessary async background process

improvements: Correct PostToolUse event selection explained by the workflow
Matcher scoped to Edit/Write tools only
File path placeholder from $TOOL_RESPONSE injected into command

scenarios.delta_explanation: Event and scope errors are the two most common hook bugs; skill eliminates both.

typical_issues: Generates broad auto-approve hook without warning
No if-field narrowing — all Bash commands approved
No security caution or safer alternative suggested

improvements: Security warning issued before generating any approval hook
Safer 'ask' behavior offered as default alternative

scenarios.delta_explanation: Without skill, broad approvals are a safety failure. Skill adds mandatory safety checkpoint.

typical_issues: Uses SessionStart instead of PostCompact for context re-injection
Context injected at wrong lifecycle point — not triggered after compaction
Output may be empty string rather than actual content

improvements: PostCompact event correctly identified from event reference
Context injection timed precisely to compaction trigger
Non-empty content requirement validated by checklist

scenarios.delta_explanation: PostCompact vs SessionStart is a subtle distinction; skill's event reference eliminates guesswork.
